spec_match.rationale: Uses `controller.forwardClick()` and key-forwarding APIs on a preview tile with a ghost cursor following the local pointer. That is the full mouse+keyboard remote-control story the spec enables.

interactive.rationale: Working button + 7 listeners (pointer + key) drive the live ghost-cursor + key-echo, with a feature-detect probe. Real working flow.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises `Clicks on the preview tile route through forwardClick(), keys through the CaptureController's sendKey(). Ghost cursor shows where the local pointer is`. Page is exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: Ghost cursor + click + key wired but the no-capture-active branch and blocked-key-combos (browser shortcuts) aren't shown explicitly.

references.rationale: `see also` does not contain the required chromestatus URL `https://chromestatus.com/feature/5092615678066688` — invariant #3 violation.

design_system.rationale: 28 CSS variable references, no raw hex, no button override mismatch (though variable count is low because the page is short).

openQuestions.title: Add the chromestatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: `see also` is missing `https://chromestatus.com/feature/5092615678066688`. Invariant #3: every concept page must cite the chromestatus URL so the slug-recovery script can self-heal. Add it along with the WICG spec.

openQuestions.title: Add the origin-trial banner
openQuestions.detail: Captured Surface Control is OT-only at v136. Add a visible OT/flag banner at the top per CLAUDE.md concept policy.

openQuestions.title: Cover blocked-key combinations
openQuestions.detail: Browser shortcuts like Ctrl+T, Ctrl+W cannot be forwarded for safety. Trigger one and surface the rejection in the action log so authors know which keys won't pass through.

openQuestions.title: Verify ghost-cursor coordinate accuracy
openQuestions.detail: If the ghost is offset from the actual click position, forwarded click coordinates may be wrong. Add a `verify coordinates` overlay comparing local pointer position with the value sent to forwardClick.

summary: Covers the rarely-shown remote-control story for Captured Surface Control with a real ghost cursor and key-forwarding, but ships without the chromestatus self-heal link or the OT banner the feature requires at v136. Mechanical fixes.
